error_signature: Cron node not triggering at expected time
title: Cron node not triggering at scheduled time due to timezone
symptom: The Cron node is either not running at all or is executing at an unexpected time. This leads to confusion about the correct scheduling.
applies_when: Configured with a specific cron expression
not_this_if: Cron node is running as expected
Server timezone matches the desired execution time
root_cause: The Cron node in n8n operates based on the server's timezone settings rather than the user's local timezone. If the server is set to UTC and the cron expression is for a different timezone, the execution time will not align with user expectations.
fix_steps: Set the timezone in n8n by exporting the TZ environment variable (e.g., export TZ='America/New_York')
Restart n8n to apply the changes
Adjust the cron expression if necessary to match the server's timezone.
agent_instruction: Set the correct timezone in n8n and restart the application.
